title: graphorkis ochreata
intro: Graphorkis ochreata, also known as the Yellow-flowered Graphorkis or Yellow Graphorkis, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, and its roots, leaves, and flowers are used in various herbal preparations. The health benefits of Graphorkis ochreata include its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, joint pain, and coughs. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling its roots and leaves in water, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
